name: novel-craft
description: Local CLI and Codex skills for webnovel/progression-fantasy drafting, effect-aware craft linting, scene cards, continuity memory, story matrices, and full-book review.

interface.shortDescription: Draft, lint, revise, and track long-form fiction.
interface.longDescription: Novel Craft provides a local `novel` CLI plus Codex skills for serial fiction, progression fantasy, effect-aware craft rule cards, creativity/trope matrices, scene cards, plot-thread state machines, layered context packets, continuity memory, story-matrix audits, and full-book reviews.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Novel Craft to review this chapter, update continuity memory, and prepare the next-chapter context packet.
